violations.text: The floors under red carts in back storage room were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and old rodent droppings. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
Foods on cart in back storage room were observed gnawed or in close proximity to pest excrement. Foods were segregated to be scanned out for disposal. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving under the chips have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2025
